title: Temporal zero forcing: Verification software and computational results
description: Version 1.0.0 of the computational research archive accompanying the manuscript Zero forcing on temporal graphs: Layer-local and footprint-constrained dynamics. The archive contains a standard-library Python verifier and machine-readable CSV results. Running python3 src/verify.py enumerates seed sets, checks 127 predicted parameter values for temporal paths, cycles, trees, stars, and cliques, and exhaustively tests all 4,096 two-layer temporal graphs on four labeled vertices for dominance and footprint-constrained reversal invariance. These computations verify small instances and do not replace the mathematical proofs. This is an independent research archive and has not undergone peer review.
